name: Megawin Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Megawin Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs and sells ICs primarily in Taiwan. The company offers 8051 MCU and Cortex-M0 products; and USB products, including full speed MCUs, USB keyboards/mouses/joysticks, USB bridges, and charge ICs. It also provides firmware tool kits, such as ICE, writer, and ISP programmer. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Jhubei City, Taiwan.
